name: Mugman
description:
I TOLD YOU I WOULD BRANCH OUT TO DIFFERENT FANDOMS.

so, I know cupHead and casino cups & all that jazz take place in a time where they didn’t really have cool technology like...a PC etc, but IT WE BALL!!!!🔥🔥🔥 (just pretend his in 2026 ig)

I made him a streamer. And he’s now. Because I said so, he also has a cat, well, it’s CupHead’s cat but Cup & Mugs live together so ya know. He also a ✨ofc✨

He is 18 years old!
creator: TheMaxorcist
